title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is a free open-source desktop app for local AI voice generation and processing. It offers voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, and REST API integration with a focus on privacy and unlimited generation as an alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs.
writeup: The video tests Voicebox, a free open-source desktop app for local AI voice generation and processing, positioned as an alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs. It runs inference locally, which keeps voice data private and removes the usage caps tied to hosted offerings. Covered features include voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, and REST API integration for tool workflows.
